/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libyolov8_trt.so -o libyolov8_trt.so CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/calibrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/postprocess.cpp.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/postprocess.cu.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/preprocess.cu.o CMakeFiles/yolov8_trt.dir/yololayer.cu.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib/stubs  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/targets/aarch64-linux/lib -lnvinfer -lcudart /usr/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
